creator: bsd@dino.sk
text:
Seems the way to go, thanks. Could then error message

usr/sbin/pkg_info missing, please install port
sysutils/pkg_install-devel

be changed to

usr/sbin/pkg_info missing. If this is a pkgng system, consider use to
'pkg audit', for older system install ports-mgmt/pkg_install port.

Or even better, detect whether old pkg_* tools are used or new pkg is
working automatically...

Regards,
Milan
